user.title: Auckland Transport Rail Closures
user.description: Track planned rail closures from the Auckland Transport website. Optionally add a free AT API key (dev-portal.at.govt.nz) to also merge in the official service alerts feed for live disruptions.

data_description.api_key: Subscription key from dev-portal.at.govt.nz. Leave empty to use website scraping only.
data_description.lines: Each selected line gets its own status sensor and calendar events.

error.invalid_auth: The AT API rejected this key. Check it on dev-portal.at.govt.nz, or leave the field empty.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the AT API to validate the key.

abort.already_configured: Already configured. Only one instance is needed.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only one instance is needed.

data_description.update_hours: How often to re-check the AT website for changes.
data_description.api_key: Subscription key from dev-portal.at.govt.nz. Clear the field to disable the service alerts feed.
data_description.lines: Each selected line gets its own status sensor and calendar events. Deselecting a line removes its entities.

error.invalid_auth: The AT API rejected this key. Check it on dev-portal.at.govt.nz, or leave the field empty.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the AT API to validate the key.
